# AUTO-GENERATED by programs/generate_deps/main.py -- do not edit by hand.
# Source: dependencies/packages.toml -- run `make gen-deps` to regenerate.

# manager: cargo | layer: 6 | packages: 7

cargo-audit  # Audit your dependencies for crates with security vulnerabilities reported to the RustSec Advisory Database.
cargo-dist  # Rust version `goreleaser`
cargo-expand  # runtime-manual cargo tool; pretty-print macro expansion
cargo-make  # Rust task runner and build tool.
cargo-zigbuild  # runtime-manual cargo tool; cross-compile via zig toolchain
maturin  # runtime-manual cargo tool; build & publish Rust-Python extensions
tre  # A modern alternative to the tree command
